steps.title: Substitute the equations
steps.content: Replace $y$ in the second equation using $y=x+33$: $$(x+33)^2=x+33.$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Let $u=x+33$, so $u^2=u$ gives $u(u-1)=0$, meaning $x+33=0$ or $x+33=1$. Thus $x=-33$ or $x=-32$.

steps.title: Pick a valid x
steps.content: Among the choices, $x=-32$ appears. That matches choice A — A is correct.
